1. Player begins at expected start position
2. Player moves right when ArrowRight is held
3. Player moves left when ArrowLeft is held
4. Player executes jump with ArrowUp when grounded
5. Player gets affected by gravity pulling down

7. Player facing direction updates left
8. Player cannot jump when in air
9. Player is grounded when standing on a platform
10. Player stops completely if no movement keys are pressed
11. Initial score begins at 0
12. Initial coins collected begins empty
13. Player touching a coin adds it to collected Set
14. Player touching a coin increments the score by +10
15. HUD score updates immediately after coin collect
16. Collecting same coin space twice does not double count
17. Multiple coins correctly stack scores
18. Reaching the end door triggers Level Complete overlay
19. Level transition to Level 2 sets correct levelIndex
20. Navigating to the end of the final level triggers Win Overlay
21. Player falling out of bounds triggers Game Over
22. Saving from Pause menu hits backend API successfully
23. Saved game updates the SQLite DB correctly
24. Missing auth token results in 401 error
25. Incorrect auth token results in 401 error
26. Backend correctly responds with hasSave = false when empty
27. Backend correctly serves the latest save data
28. Reloading page correctly fetches save data from Backend via API
29. Continuing game fetches level index and score properly from Backend
30. Backend properly overrides duplicate saves for same user
31. Game Over state correctly resets game when starting new game
